name: Azora Engine
description: Native and browser game engine written in Azora 0.0.4, with modular rendering, ECS, Metal, and an Engine WASM runtime for interactive web previews.

templates.label: App
templates.description: A native desktop app rendered by the Azora Engine — starts with a title and two buttons.

templates.label: Game
templates.description: A native 3D/2D game — pick a starting point: Tetris, an endless runner, shape examples or an empty scene.

variants.label: Tetris (2D)
variants.description: Falling pieces, line clears and score — a complete 2D game.

variants.label: Temple Run (3D)
variants.description: An endless runner: three lanes, jumping and obstacles.

variants.label: Side Scroller (2D)
variants.description: A platformer: hop across procedural platforms, camera scrolls sideways.

variants.label: Side Scroller (3D)
variants.description: The side-scrolling platformer in 3D, with a tracking camera and parallax.

variants.label: Shape Examples
variants.description: Guided basics: colored shapes, transforms, camera and UI.

variants.label: ECS + Decorators
variants.description: A modular ECS scene using @Component, @System, @Query, jobs and a render queue.

variants.label: Empty
variants.description: A 3D scene with a cube, a grid and a WASD fly camera.
